name: A.m.delight Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat eggs; add oil, milk, and vanilla. Mix well; stir into dry ingredients just until moistened. Fold in the remaining ingredients.
3. Fill greased or paper-lined muffin cups three-fourths full with batter.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes, or until muffins are done.
